title: MDC-4800
short description: Motorola's MDC-4800 is a data protocol that was used in ARDIS and DataTAC Networks as well as in MDT networks. RD-LAP was derived from this mode. Also known as Motorola Mobile Data Communications System (MODACOM)
description:
Motorola's **MDC-4800** is a data protocol that was used in ARDIS and DataTAC Networks as well as in MDT networks. [RD-LAP](https://www.sigidwiki.com/wiki/Radio Data Link Access Procedure (RD-LAP)) was derived from this mode. Also known as Motorola Mobile Data Communications System (MODACOM)

Apart from ARDIS, MDC-4800 was used in MDT, public safety, and other data terminal usages.
